services.title: Property & Facilities Management
services.summary: Reliable support for landlords, tenants and property owners.
services.details: We support landlords and property owners with tenant relations, inspections, maintenance coordination, service provider supervision, common area management and practical day-to-day property oversight.

services.title: Rent Collection & Landlord Reporting
services.summary: Clear systems that help landlords stay in control.
services.details: We help with rent tracking, tenant follow-up, receipts and records, reminders, monthly reports and clear landlord updates so that property income and tenant records are easier to manage.

services.title: Real Estate, Land & Property Sales Support
services.summary: Professional support for buying, selling and marketing property.
services.details: We support property marketing, listings, viewings, buyer and tenant coordination, negotiation support and liaison with relevant professionals during sale, purchase, lease or letting processes.

services.title: Cleaning, Hygiene & Pest Control
services.summary: Clean, safe and healthy spaces for homes, offices and shared properties.
services.details: We provide office cleaning, residential cleaning, post-construction cleaning, fumigation, pest control and hygiene support for homes, offices, buildings and shared spaces.

services.title: Grounds Maintenance & Minor Works
services.summary: Practical support that keeps properties safe, neat and functional.
services.details: We support landscaping, gardening, preventive maintenance, minor repairs, safety checks, handyman coordination, painting and basic property improvement works.

services.title: Consultancy & Advisory Services
services.summary: Practical advice for better property, facilities and operational performance.
services.details: We provide advisory support in property operations, facilities management, service improvement, compliance support, investment readiness and operational efficiency.
